author: Genshin Impact
text:
Transcendence Trailer - "Sudden Snow" | Genshin Impact #GenshinImpact #GenshinSnezhnaya
Sleep well, sleep well, children of this world...
Fear neither the dark nor the deathly stillness,
For the divine has promised you unconditional love.
‌
Awaken, awaken, O storm with neither root nor source!
If blessings are so generous, so selfless,
Then why has mercy never reached the winter?

VA:
Vodyanitsa — Suzie Yeung
Alyosha — Kevin Andrew Rivera
Odette — Alexis Tipton
Valeriy — Jordan Reynolds
"The Rooster" Pulcinella — Dave B. Mitchell
"Childe" Tartaglia — Griffin Burns
"Marionette" Sandrone — Deneen Melody
"The Knave" Arlecchino — Erin Yvette
"Regrator" Pantalone — J. Michael Tatum
Vesna — Ari Thrash
Danica — Natalie Van Sistine
Noy — Jonathan Bullock
Mitya — Brian Balance
Anastasya Feodorovna Snezhnaya — Lara Korba
"Ruler of Death" Ronova — Aiden Dawn
"Gold" Rhinedottir — Ivy Dupler
